$comment: Repo-level MCP server configuration. Read by Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP-aware clients. Mirrored to .vscode/mcp.json for VS Code Copilot and to .cursor/mcp.json for Cursor.

codegraph.$comment: CodeGraph — semantic code intelligence: symbol lookup, callers/callees, route mapping. Requires 'codegraph init -i' inside the project to build the index. If you have codegraph installed globally via 'codegraph install --location=global', this workspace entry takes precedence and they do not conflict (same args). See docs/guides/MCP_SETUP.md.
